summary_one_line: Input must contain a well-formed sPLT chunk so png parses splt_palettes != NULL, enabling the true branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A chunk whose 4-byte type field equals the ASCII tag 'sPLT' (0x73 0x50 0x4c 0x54) at the chunk-type offset (e.g. 0x35-0x38), so png_handle_sPLT allocates info_ptr->splt_palettes and the blocker's `splt_palettes != NULL` test is true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seed 3 (cmplog, id=4e93d4e85f61dcd4) carries the bytes 73 50 4c 54 ('sPLT') at offset 0x35; cmplog's CMP buffer logs the libpng chunk-type comparison constant and I2SRandReplace splices the exact 4-byte tag into the input, so splt_palettes becomes non-NULL.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every naive loser seed has the chunk-type bytes concentrated on 73 52 47 42 ('sRGB') with no 'sPLT' value at 0x35-0x38, so png never allocates splt_palettes and the branch's NULL pointer stays NULL (loser T=0 at line 565).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer for the 4-byte chunk-type comparison and substitutes the matching 'sPLT' literal into the input bytes, manufacturing the exact magic tag that havoc-only naive cannot land by chance.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same 4-byte 'sPLT' chunk-type tag, reached via incremental byte progress toward the literal so the chunk-type comparison eventually matches and splt_palettes is allocated.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile keeps a CMP_MAP keyed by operand-distance; partial-prefix matches of the chunk-type bytes toward 'sPLT' are retained as new buckets, letting value_profile climb the Hamming/prefix gradient to the full tag and resolve the branch in 10/10 trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive has no CMP_MAP feedback; its loser seeds stay pinned on the 'sRGB' tag at 0x35-0x38 with no partial-progress reward toward 'sPLT', so it never assembles the chunk type and remains blocked 10/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards inputs whose chunk-type bytes are closer to the 'sPLT' literal, providing a gradient that guides naive's same havoc mutators to the magic tag that plain naive coverage cannot sense.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker tests info_ptr->splt_palettes != NULL, the sPLT-entry pointer.
The cmplog winner seed contains the ASCII bytes for 'sPLT' at offset 0x35.
The loser naive seeds carry 'sRGB' rather than 'sPLT' at the chunk-type offset.
At the chunk-type bytes the winner set is diverse including S/P/L/T while losers concentrate on a single value.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for an operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile rewards an input whose CMP-operand pair is closer to matching with a new CMP_MAP bucket.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has only havoc/token mutators with no I2S and no CMP_MAP gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog and value_profile resolve the branch 10/10 while naive is blocked 10/10.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3811 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 4e93d4e85f61dcd4` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 6 of the 7-level ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating splt_palettes on a 4-byte 'sPLT' chunk-type literal in which naive resolves as fast as cmplog/value_profile (no I2S or CMP_MAP advantage), showing the magic tag is not the divergence driver.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile gradient claim is inferred from CMP_MAP semantics rather than direct distance-bucket lineage evidence, since value_profile winner seeds are not shown separately in BRANCH SEEDS.
